data.body: Plan-review PASS (advisory=18, signed). Triage: (1) applies_when vocabulary — plan-review active_triggers are REAL criterion ids (F1/G5/...) from surviving findings, NOT semantic labels; so move 10's applies_when = ['G5','A1','T2'] (the too-big / premature-complexity / risky-assumption findings where 'ship the foundation, defer the ideal to a follow-on' is productive). (2) test_review_kernel.py:485 (test_plan_review_coach_reexports...) asserts EVERY move is always-applicable — an unlisted consumer; updating it to allow the scoped move 10 (off with no trigger, on for its triggers). (3) AC4 'follow-up-ticket move' = the foundation/enhancement move (10) itself: its template routes the ideal to a DEPENDENT FOLLOW-ON ticket, not a defer; no DEFERRED_MEASUREMENT move is added (dropped as counter-architectural). (4) move 9 + move 10 templates authored verbatim (single {subject}, locked). Move 9 sharpened to 'restate a deferred/unobservable target as an observable proxy' WITHOUT implying the F1 in_session_evaluable sub-item independently blocks. (5) docs move table mirrored + a doc<->MOVE_REGISTRY parity test added (the 'diff check').
